case_title: DICKER, M. LAINA VS SONG, YOUNG J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,068.31 FILED BY DICKER, M. LAINA AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, YOUNG J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SONG, YOUNG J.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SONG, YOUNG J. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT DICKER, M. LAINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DICKER, M. LAINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SONG, YOUNG J. $3,068.31 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,088.10 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SONG, YOUNG J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DICKER, M. LAINA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUGMENT TO DEFT RETURNED NOT KNOWN.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT SONG, YOUNG J. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT DICKER, M. LAINA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
